pinned_baseline._full_history_smoke: 2026-04-29 positive-price-filtered full-history smoke: 487,725/490,103 tradable MNQ1 5m bars, 83 windows, 28/83 positive OOS, agg IS Sharpe -0.707, agg OOS Sharpe -2.958, degradation 51.8%, DSR median 0.000, DSR pass 13.2%, strict gate FAIL. A targeted full-history retune checked five serious ORB alternatives; best checked OOS remained negative (-2.368, DSR pass 25.3%). This supersedes any interpretation of v2 as promotion-grade; keep it as a plain-ORB shadow benchmark only while mnq_orb_sage_v1 remains the stronger READY MNQ lane.

pinned_baseline._notes: Shadow/diagnostic baseline only, not a live or paper promotion candidate. Persisted so drift checks and launch readiness keep the known-bad plain ORB lane visible without blocking OP-16. Full latest-20k combined backtest: 50 trades, 20.0% win rate, avg R -0.2593, max DD 18.306%, total return -12.6815%; the improvement is OOS-slice relative to the prior latest-slice smoke, not a complete production promotion.
